content: [2/8] Verify Eyes (Gemma) endpoint is reachable from the preview backend (network, healthcheck, model file loaded)
[3/8] Trace request paths: closet AddItem flow, size-chart flow, outfit/recommendations — which provider each one ACTUALLY uses today
[4/8] Verify the Developer/Internal switch wires through to the runtime (admin endpoint round-trip)
[5/8] Check provider_activity logs / response telemetry — are responses tagged with the actual provider used?
[6/8] Inspect frontend: does any UI surface 'analyzed by gemma vs gemini'? If not, is there hidden telemetry to confirm?
[7/8] Run live A/B test: force EYES_PROVIDER=gemma and EYES_PROVIDER=gemini in turn, compare outputs on the same input
[8/8] Write findings report with concrete remediation steps
